Stack.name: ARCHIVE
Stack.description: Stack for processing documents to be archived

StackExtension.name: set file path and file name

Stack.name: LOCALPRINTING
Stack.description: PCL-rendered documents to be printed locally

StackExtension.name: set path name and file name

Stack.name: CENTRALPRINTING
Stack.description: Stack for rendering document collections to AFP format. One file for each country of destination is produced.

StackExtension.name: set file path and file name
prepare parameters to send fax via e-mail-gateway

Stack.name: CENTRALPRINTING_PDFVT
Stack.description: Stack for rendering document collections to PDF-VT format. One file for each country of destination is produced.

Stack.name: ARCHIVE_ZUGFeRD
Stack.description: Stack for processing documents to be archived

StackExtension.name: set file path and file name

PrintType.descriptionOfPrintType: For PrintDocumentExtension via jps on windows
For PrintDocumentExtension via perl on unix and windows

StackGroupID.descriptionOfStackGroup: Stacks to reprint sinlge documents of collect files
